message:
🌱 Sync workflows from kubestellar/infra (#2406)

Co-authored-by: GitHub Actions <noreply@github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,9 @@
+name: Copilot DCO
+
+on:
+  pull_request:
+    types: [opened, synchronize, reopened]
+
+jobs:
+  copilot-dco:
+    uses: kubestellar/infra/.github/workflows/reusable-copilot-dco.yml@main
